message.content:
The panel is **not blank/white**. Here’s the exact breakdown:  

### Sidebar (Right Side):  
- A vertical sidebar with a **purple header** (containing “فرم ساز من” / “My Form Builder” and a user icon).  
- Below the header: A list of menu items (each with an icon and Persian text):  
  - “فرم های من” (My Forms)  
  - “پروفایل من” (My Profile)  
  - “داده ها” (Data)  
  - “اعلان ها” (Notifications)  
  - “تنظیمات” (Settings)  
  - “پشتیبانی” (Support)  
- At the bottom: A button labeled “راهنمای استفاده از فرم ساز” (Form Builder Usage Guide) with a right arrow.  


### Main Content Area (Left Side):  
- A **purple gradient header** (with “50% تخفیف ویژه” / “Special 50% Discount” in a small badge, and abstract purple shapes).  
- Below the header: A user profile section with:  
  - A purple avatar (with a white “S” icon).  
  - Text: “فرم ساز من” (My Form Builder), “کاربر ویژه” (Special User), and “user@formsaz.ir” (email).  
  - A small green dot (likely an online status indicator).  
  - A note: “برای شروع، فرم بسازید” (To start, create a form).  
- Three white cards (with colored icons and numbers):  
  - Green icon + “6” + “فرم ساخته شده” (Forms Created).  
  - Orange icon + “0” + “لایک” (Likes).  
  - Purple icon + “0” + “پاسخ” (Responses).  
- At the bottom: A small text: “آخرین بروزرسانی ۲ روز پیش” (Last Updated 2 Days Ago) with a clock icon.  


### Empty Space:  
- The main content area has **white background** with padding/margins around elements (e.g., between the purple header, profile section, and cards).  
- The sidebar has a white background with spacing between menu items.  


No large blank/white sections dominate the panel—both the sidebar and main content contain structured elements.
